title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at UPS India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at UPS India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
